rationale: Gov't Code §2001.901 governs appeals from district court judgments and appeal bonds for state agencies. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 2001.901. APPEAL FROM DISTRICT COURT. (a) A party may appeal a final district court judgment under this chapter in the manner provided for civil actions generally.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this administrative appeals provision.
